lines.chinese: 为什么他们的伪装“太完美”了？
lines.raw: Why was their disguise 'too perfect' ? | 为什么他们的伪装“太完美”了？

lines.english: An ancient bus stopped by a dry river bed and a party of famous actors and actresses got off.
lines.chinese: 一辆老旧的公共汽车停在一条干涸的河床上，一群著名演员下了车。
lines.raw: An ancient bus stopped by a dry river bed and a party of famous actors and actresses got off. | 一辆老旧的公共汽车停在一条干涸的河床上，一群著名演员下了车。

lines.english: Dressed in dark glasses and old clothes,
lines.chinese: 他们戴着墨镜，穿着旧衣服，
lines.raw: Dressed in dark glasses and old clothes, | 他们戴着墨镜，穿着旧衣服，

lines.english: they had taken special precautions so that no one should recognize them.
lines.chinese: 他们采取了特殊的预防措施，以防被人认出来。
lines.raw: they had taken special precautions so that no one should recognize them. | 他们采取了特殊的预防措施，以防被人认出来。

lines.english: But as they soon discovered, disguises can sometimes be too perfect.
lines.chinese: 但他们很快发现，伪装有时会过于完美。
lines.raw: But as they soon discovered, disguises can sometimes be too perfect. | 但他们很快发现，伪装有时会过于完美。

lines.english: 'This is a wonderful place for a picnic,' said Gloria Gleam.
lines.chinese: “这里真是个野餐的好地方，”格洛丽亚·格莱姆说。
lines.raw: 'This is a wonderful place for a picnic,' said Gloria Gleam. | “这里真是个野餐的好地方，”格洛丽亚·格莱姆说。

lines.english: 'It couldn't be better, Gloria,' Brinksley Meers agreed.
lines.chinese: “再好不过了，格洛丽亚，”布林克斯利·米尔斯同意道。
lines.raw: 'It couldn't be better, Gloria,' Brinksley Meers agreed. | “再好不过了，格洛丽亚，”布林克斯利·米尔斯同意道。

lines.english: 'No newspaper men, no film fans! Why don't we come more often?'
lines.chinese: “没有记者，没有影迷！我们为什么不常来呢？”
lines.raw: 'No newspaper men, no film fans! Why don't we come more often?' | “没有记者，没有影迷！我们为什么不常来呢？”

lines.english: Meanwhile, two other actors Rockwall Slinger and Merlin Greeves,
lines.chinese: 与此同时，另外两名演员洛克沃尔·斯林格和梅林·格里夫斯，
lines.raw: Meanwhile, two other actors Rockwall Slinger and Merlin Greeves, | 与此同时，另外两名演员洛克沃尔·斯林格和梅林·格里夫斯，

lines.english: had carried two large food baskets to a shady spot under some trees.
lines.chinese: 已经把两大篮食物搬到了一片树荫下。
lines.raw: had carried two large food baskets to a shady spot under some trees. | 已经把两大篮食物搬到了一片树荫下。

lines.english: When they had all made themselves comfortable, a stranger appeared.
lines.chinese: 当他们都安顿好时，一个陌生人出现了。
lines.raw: When they had all made themselves comfortable, a stranger appeared. | 当他们都安顿好时，一个陌生人出现了。
He looked very angry. | 他看起来非常生气。

lines.english: 'Now you get out of here, all of you!' he shouted.
lines.chinese: “你们现在都给我滚出去，你们所有人！”他喊道。
lines.raw: 'Now you get out of here, all of you!' he shouted. | “你们现在都给我滚出去，你们所有人！”他喊道。

lines.english: 'I'm sheriff here. Do you see that notice? It says "No Camping"  -- in case you can't read!'
lines.chinese: “我是这里的治安官。你看到那张告示了吗？上面写着‘禁止露营’——以防你不识字！”
lines.raw: 'I'm sheriff here. Do you see that notice? It says "No Camping"  -- in case you can't read!' | “我是这里的治安官。你看到那张告示了吗？上面写着‘禁止露营’——以防你不识字！”
'Look, sheriff,' said Rockwall, | “看，治安官，”洛克沃尔说，

lines.english: 'don't be too hard on us. I'm Rockwall Slinger and this is Merlin Greeves.'
lines.chinese: “别对我们太严厉。我是洛克沃尔·斯林格，这是梅林·格里夫斯。”
lines.raw: 'don't be too hard on us. I'm Rockwall Slinger and this is Merlin Greeves.' | “别对我们太严厉。我是洛克沃尔·斯林格，这是梅林·格里夫斯。”

lines.english: 'Oh, is it?' said the sheriff with a sneer.
lines.raw: 'Oh, is it?' said the sheriff with a sneer. | “哦，是吗？”治安官嘲讽地说。

lines.english: 'Well, I'm Brinksley Meers, and my other name is Gloria Gleam. Now you get out of here fast!'
lines.chinese: “嗯，我是布林克斯利·米尔斯，我的另一个名字是格洛丽亚·格莱姆。你们现在赶紧滚出去！”
lines.raw: 'Well, I'm Brinksley Meers, and my other name is Gloria Gleam. Now you get out of here fast!' | “嗯，我是布林克斯利·米尔斯，我的另一个名字是格洛丽亚·格莱姆。你们现在赶紧滚出去！”
